# External-oracle reference for kshana's general (EME2000) CCSDS OEM export.
# Oracle: the oem library (Brad Sease <bradsease@gmail.com>, MIT) + astropy + numpy.
# Independent CCSDS 502.0-B OEM parser; separate codebase from src/oem.rs.
# Consumed by tests/ccsds_oem_interop_reference.rs.
# See generate_ccsds_oem_interop_reference.py for provenance/scope/findings.
#
# FINDING: the oem library enforces a single OBJECT_NAME across all segments
#   (CCSDS 502.0 segments = contiguous arcs of ONE object). kshana's
#   from_propagators writes one segment per satellite (distinct OBJECT_NAMEs),
#   which the oem library REJECTS ('OBJECT_NAME not fixed in OEM'). The
#   multi-segment fixture below is two arcs of one object accordingly.
#
# TOKENS <combo> <seg> | REF_FRAME | TIME_SYSTEM | CENTER_NAME | OBJECT_NAME | OBJECT_ID
# STATE  <combo> <seg> | <index> | px,py,pz [km] | vx,vy,vz [km/s]  (oracle-decoded)
# XLEO   <index> | px,py,pz [km] | vx,vy,vz [km/s]  (oracle decode of external_leo.oem,
#         covariance block stripped — the oem library rejects its multi-entry COV lines)
TOKENS LEO_SINGLE 0 | EME2000 | UTC | EARTH | KSHANA-LEO-1 | KSHANA-LEO-1
STATE LEO_SINGLE 0 | 0 | 4701.664852,3981.898815,3042.798529 | -5.267521841,2.461418785,4.924877664
STATE LEO_SINGLE 0 | 1 | 2892.878652,4488.732441,4326.558916 | -6.679650976,0.886431626,3.554669819
STATE LEO_SINGLE 0 | 2 | 767.344019,4504.124377,5136.642694 | -7.359815378,-0.784548624,1.796312988
STATE LEO_SINGLE 0 | 3 | -1442.173333,4026.758518,5384.782969 | -7.234597288,-2.368320669,-0.156982279
STATE LEO_SINGLE 0 | 4 | -3494.099285,3109.25452,5044.3645 | -6.319140366,-3.691849707,-2.091264154
STATE LEO_SINGLE 0 | 5 | -5164.52467,1852.219384,4153.121283 | -4.714871124,-4.611175471,-3.795450998
STATE LEO_SINGLE 0 | 6 | -6271.557886,393.097819,2808.782747 | -2.59781712,-5.026870436,-5.084291431
STATE LEO_SINGLE 0 | 7 | -6694.943188,-1108.8934,1158.242502 | -0.199052739,-4.894475206,-5.81820928
STATE LEO_SINGLE 0 | 8 | -6388.908923,-2490.080336,-618.501935 | 2.220456267,-4.228952237,-5.918033248
STATE LEO_SINGLE 0 | 9 | -5386.964351,-3600.038219,-2327.879002 | 4.39790083,-3.102841045,-5.373221177
STATE LEO_SINGLE 0 | 10 | -3798.206673,-4317.828622,-3783.665896 | 6.096700472,-1.638404096,-4.242858711
STATE LEO_SINGLE 0 | 11 | -1795.555145,-4565.076372,-4827.113181 | 7.131801135,0.005408735,-2.649387112
TOKENS MEO_MULTISEG 0 | EME2000 | UTC | EARTH | KSHANA-MEO-1 | KSHANA-MEO-1
STATE MEO_MULTISEG 0 | 0 | 18089.467048,14618.532347,12312.176367 | -2.666590839,1.107064227,2.636248472
STATE MEO_MULTISEG 0 | 1 | 16420.465459,15224.406243,13843.428639 | -2.893055234,0.911228624,2.464611189
STATE MEO_MULTISEG 0 | 2 | 14622.403766,15710.62428,15265.880435 | -3.096511412,0.70848262,2.273832272
STATE MEO_MULTISEG 0 | 3 | 12709.569715,16073.533065,16568.515499 | -3.27538503,0.500476166,2.065498638
STATE MEO_MULTISEG 0 | 4 | 10697.13142,16310.480413,17741.312165 | -3.428317722,0.288894015,1.841335859
STATE MEO_MULTISEG 0 | 5 | 8601.004684,16419.831471,18775.32138 | -3.554176997,0.075439908,1.603190758
TOKENS MEO_MULTISEG 1 | EME2000 | UTC | EARTH | KSHANA-MEO-1 | KSHANA-MEO-1
STATE MEO_MULTISEG 1 | 0 | 6437.715157,16400.975403,19662.734005 | -3.652063522,-0.1381791,1.353013106
STATE MEO_MULTISEG 1 | 1 | 4224.256906,16254.322764,20396.936927 | -3.721315796,-0.350267938,1.092836704
STATE MEO_MULTISEG 1 | 2 | 1977.948958,15981.293847,20972.557714 | -3.761512268,-0.559158292,0.82476013
STATE MEO_MULTISEG 1 | 3 | -283.708687,15584.29837,21385.497678 | -3.772470984,-0.763222665,0.550927402

XTOKENS | EME2000 | UTC | EARTH | EXAMPLESAT | 2024-001A
XLEO 0 | -6045.0,-3490.0,2500.0 | -3.457,6.618,2.534

# total_states = 24
